title: Interest to be part of alms funds
doc_html:
§510.  Interest to be part of alms funds

Any interest accruing from the funds of the alms funds while on deposit or otherwise, shall constitute a part of the fund.
doc_text:
§510.  Interest to be part of alms funds
Any interest accruing from the funds of the alms funds while on deposit or otherwise, shall constitute a part of the fund.
